author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Phase 2 COMPLETE. 20/20 subissues closed (4 deferred as non-blocking). 290 nn tests + 203 core tests = 493 total, all passing. Implemented: Module trait, Parameter, 9 init functions, Linear, Conv2d (im2col), LayerNorm, GroupNorm, RMSNorm, 9 activations, Dropout/Dropout2d, MaxPool2d/AvgPool2d/AdaptiveAvgPool2d, Embedding, LSTM, MultiheadAttention, Sequential/ModuleList/ModuleDict, 4 loss functions, gradient clipping. Deferred: derive macro, functional API, SafeTensors loading (ergonomic features, not blockers).
